_note: Curated map of CISA KEV CVEs to a runnable Vulhub environment. Vulhub (https://github.com/vulhub/vulhub) ships a per-CVE docker-compose for each. Paths verified to resolve under github.com/vulhub/vulhub/tree/master/<path>. This is a teaching slice, not exhaustive — extend it as you map more KEV entries to reproducible targets. The 'reference' flag marks the one target this lab ships a worked exploit+detection for (the demo); the others are leads for you to build out.

CVE-2021-44228.detect_note: JNDI lookup string (${jndi:ldap://...}) in a request URI/header or User-Agent; outbound LDAP/RMI/DNS callback from the server.

CVE-2022-22965.detect_note: class.module.classLoader.* parameters in a POST body; an unexpected .jsp written under webapps.

CVE-2024-23897.detect_note: CLI requests using @-prefixed file arguments; reads of /etc/passwd or Jenkins secrets.

CVE-2022-26134.detect_note: OGNL payload (${...}) in the request URI path; unexpected child process of the Confluence JVM.

CVE-2023-22515.exploit_class: Broken access control / privileged account creation
CVE-2023-22515.detect_note: requests to /setup/* after first-run; creation of a new admin user.

CVE-2021-26084.detect_note: OGNL in the queryString parameter of /pages/createpage-entervariables.action.

CVE-2021-22205.detect_note: crafted DjVu image upload to /uploads; unexpected child process of the GitLab Rails/ExifTool worker.

CVE-2020-14882.detect_note: console requests with ../ traversal in the path; com.tangosol.coherence gadget in the body.
